div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Layered Defence — no single layer is the boundary, the overlap is

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
INPUT VALIDATION (sanitise, delimit, scope)
SYSTEM PROMPT (hardened, defence-in-depth)
SPOTLIGHTING (delimit retrieved content)
OUTPUT FILTERING (sanitise URLs, HTML, code)
TOOL AuthZ (per-tool arg checks, least-priv)
MONITORING (refusal/cost spikes, abnormal tool calls)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Lethal Trifecta (Simon Willison) — break one leg to defuse

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
① Direct prompt injection
User input overrides system instructions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
② Indirect prompt injection
Poisoned retrieved content (web/emails/RAG)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
③ Data leakage
System prompt extraction · PII echo · cross-tenant leak

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
④ Output handling
SQL/JS/shell in output · Markdown image exfiltration

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⑤ Excessive agency
Tools without authZ · broad permissions · no human-in-loop
